name: Changeover Matrix Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool for analyzing and optimizing changeover times between product families using Lean/SMED principles and Six Sigma methodologies.

inputs.label: Changeover Time Matrix (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Average time to switch from one product to another within the same production line. Based on SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time to switch from one product to another within the same production line. Based on SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aynı üretim hattında bir üründen diğerine geçiş için ortalama süre. SMED (Tek Dakikada Kalıp Değişimi) standartlarına dayanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Zeit für den Wechsel von einem Produkt zum anderen innerhalb derselben Produktionslinie. Basierend auf SMED-Standards (Single-Minute Exchange of Die).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps moyen pour passer d'un produit à un autre sur la même ligne de production. Basé sur les normes SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo promedio para cambiar de un producto a otro dentro de la misma línea de producción. Basado en estándares SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die).

inputs.label: Number of Changeovers per Month
inputs.businessContext: Total changeovers performed monthly across all shifts. Used to calculate total changeover downtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total changeovers performed monthly across all shifts. Used to calculate total changeover downtime.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm vardiyalarda aylık olarak gerçekleştirilen toplam değişim sayısı. Toplam değişim duruş süresini hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der monatlich durchgeführten Rüstvorgänge über alle Schichten. Wird zur Berechnung der gesamten Rüstzeit verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de changements effectués mensuellement sur tous les postes. Utilisé pour calculer le temps d'arrêt total dû aux changements.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de cambios realizados mensualmente en todos los turnos. Se utiliza para calcular el tiempo total de inactividad por cambios.

inputs.label: External Setup Time per Changeover (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Setup activities that can be performed while the machine is running (e.g., tool preparation). Target for SMED optimization.

label_i18n.fr: Temps de réglage externe par changement (minutes)
label_i18n.es: Tiempo de preparación externa por cambio (minutos)

businessContext_i18n.en: Setup activities that can be performed while the machine is running (e.g., tool preparation). Target for SMED optimization.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Makine çalışırken gerçekleştirilebilen kurulum faaliyetleri (örneğin, takım hazırlığı). SMED optimizasyonu için hedef.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rüstaktivitäten, die bei laufender Maschine durchgeführt werden können (z. B. Werkzeugvorbereitung). Ziel für SMED-Optimierung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Activités de réglage pouvant être effectuées pendant que la machine fonctionne (ex. préparation des outils). Cible pour l'optimisation SMED.
businessContext_i18n.es: Actividades de preparación que se pueden realizar mientras la máquina está en funcionamiento (por ejemplo, preparación de herramientas). Objetivo para la optimización SMED.

inputs.label: Internal Setup Time per Changeover (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Setup activities that require the machine to be stopped. Primary target for reduction via SMED.

label_i18n.fr: Temps de réglage interne par changement (minutes)
label_i18n.es: Tiempo de preparación interna por cambio (minutos)

businessContext_i18n.en: Setup activities that require the machine to be stopped. Primary target for reduction via SMED.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Makinenin durdurulmasını gerektiren kurulum faaliyetleri. SMED ile azaltma için birincil hedef.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rüstaktivitäten, die einen Maschinenstopp erfordern. Primäres Ziel für Reduzierung durch SMED.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Activités de réglage nécessitant l'arrêt de la machine. Cible principale de réduction via SMED.
businessContext_i18n.es: Actividades de preparación que requieren que la máquina se detenga. Objetivo principal de reducción mediante SMED.

inputs.label: Number of Product Families
inputs.businessContext: Distinct product groups processed on the line. Higher counts increase changeover complexity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distinct product groups processed on the line. Higher counts increase changeover complexity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hatta işlenen farklı ürün grupları. Yüksek sayılar değişim karmaşıklığını artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Unterschiedliche Produktgruppen, die auf der Linie verarbeitet werden. Höhere Anzahl erhöht die Rüstkomplexität.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Groupes de produits distincts traités sur la ligne. Un nombre plus élevé augmente la complexité des changements de série.
businessContext_i18n.es: Grupos de productos distintos procesados en la línea. Un mayor número aumenta la complejidad de los cambios.

inputs.label: Standard Deviation of Changeover Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Measure of variability in changeover times. Used for Six Sigma process capability analysis.

label_i18n.fr: Écart type du temps de changement de série (minutes)
label_i18n.es: Desviación estándar del tiempo de cambio (minutos)

businessContext_i18n.en: Measure of variability in changeover times. Used for Six Sigma process capability analysis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değişim sürelerindeki değişkenlik ölçüsü. Altı Sigma proses yetenek analizi için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maß für die Variabilität der Rüstzeiten. Wird für die Six-Sigma-Prozessfähigkeitsanalyse verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure de la variabilité des temps de changement de série. Utilisé pour l'analyse de capabilité de processus Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medida de variabilidad en tiempos de cambio. Se utiliza para el análisis de capacidad de Seis Sigma.

inputs.label: Shift Pattern
inputs.businessContext: Operating schedule affecting available production time and changeover frequency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Operating schedule affecting available production time and changeover frequency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kullanılabilir üretim süresini ve değişim sıklığını etkileyen çalışma takvimi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betriebsplan, der die verfügbare Produktionszeit und Rüsthäufigkeit beeinflusst.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Horaire de fonctionnement affectant le temps de production disponible et la fréquence des changements de série.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horario operativo que afecta el tiempo de producción disponible y la frecuencia de cambios.

inputs.label: SMED Implementation Status
inputs.businessContext: Indicates whether Single-Minute Exchange of Die principles have been formally applied.

label_i18n.fr: Statut de mise en œuvre du SMED

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates whether Single-Minute Exchange of Die principles have been formally applied.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek Dakikada Kalıp Değiştirme prensiplerinin resmi olarak uygulanıp uygulanmadığını belirtir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gibt an, ob die SMED-Prinzipien (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) formal angewendet wurden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indique si les principes du Single-Minute Exchange of Die ont été formellement appliqués.
businessContext_i18n.es: Indica si los principios de SMED se han aplicado formalmente.

rules.message: Sum of internal and external setup times cannot exceed total changeover time.
Target changeover time may be unrealistic without SMED implementation.
At least 2 product families required for matrix optimization.

thresholds.message: Changeover time exceeds 60 minutes. Immediate SMED analysis recommended.
Coefficient of variation >30%. Process is unstable. Apply Six Sigma DMAIC.
External setup ratio below 20%. Opportunity to convert internal to external tasks.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
